name: Configure Regions
body:
[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The "},{"text":"Regions","bold":true},{"text":" section provides a "},{"text":"read-only view","bold":true},{"text":" of how geographic regions are structured in your store. Each region represents a group of countries associated with a specific currency, helping define how pricing and regional settings are applied during checkout."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"At this time, "},{"text":"Region settings are not configurable","bold":true},{"text":". This page is intended for "},{"text":"display and reference only","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"To access, "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Go to "},{"text":"Settings → Region","bold":true},{"text":". "}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/SXN8HXZIEULF/image.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/SXN8HXZIEULF/image.png","name":"image.png","type":"image/png","size":700664,"width":1920,"height":1075,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FSXN8HXZIEULF%2Fimage.png","active":true,"mediaID":2085,"dateInserted":"2026-01-27T06:34:11+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"
What You Can See on the Region Page"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"On the "},{"text":"Manage Region Details","bold":true},{"text":" page, you can view:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Region Title","bold":true},{"text":"
The name of the region (for example, Australia or APAC)."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Currency","bold":true},{"text":"
The currency associated with the region, which is used for pricing and checkout."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Countries","bold":true},{"text":"
The list of countries grouped under the region."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/1XF2VTD8SGE0/image.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/1XF2VTD8SGE0/image.png","name":"image.png","type":"image/png","size":616528,"width":1920,"height":1075,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2F1XF2VTD8SGE0%2Fimage.png","active":true,"mediaID":2084,"dateInserted":"2026-01-27T06:33:41+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" For example, an "},{"text":"APAC","bold":true},{"text":" region may display a selected currency along with countries such as China, Japan, and South Korea. These countries follow the region’s predefined currency and configuration."}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"
Why This Page Matters"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Even though Regions cannot be configured currently, this view helps you:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Understand how countries are grouped in your store"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Verify which currency applies to different regions"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Reference regional setup when managing products, pricing, and checkout behavior"}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"As regional configuration options expand in future updates, this page will serve as the foundation for managing multi-country and multi-currency setups more actively."}]}]
